inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakan mehsoos kar raha hoon, sar bhi dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakan ke symptons viral fever ki taraf ishara karte hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak khansi ki koi shikayat nahi hai, isliye bronchitis ki sambhavana kam hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak TB ke kisi specific symptom ki pahchan nahi hui hai

inputs.text: Maine kal se sookhi khansi shuru ho gayi hai, bukhar bhi thoda hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Sookhi khansi bronchitis ki taraf ishara karti hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakan abhi bhi maujood hain, lekin khansi ki shuruaat bronchitis ki taraf le jaati hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak TB ke specific symptoms nahi hain

inputs.text: Maine 2 hafte se zyada khansi hai, raat ko pasina aata hai aur wazan kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona aur lambi khansi TB ki cardinal signs hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Khansi toh hai, lekin raat ko pasina aur wazan kam hona bronchitis mein aam nahi hain

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia mein aam taur par bukhar aur saans lene mein takleef hoti hai, jo abhi nahi hai

inputs.text: Main bohot kamzor mehsoos kar raha hoon, khansi ke saath kabhi-kabhi thook mein khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Thook mein khoon aana TB ki ek classic sign hai, khansi aur kamzori bhi TB ke symptoms hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki bronchitis mein itni lambi khansi aur thook mein khoon aana aam nahi hai

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki pneumonia mein bukhar aur saans lene mein takleef hoti hai, jo abhi nahi hai
